products.name: SPEAK NO EVIL Graphic T-Shirt
products.description: Silence speaks louder than words. French-crafted cotton bearing the three wise monkeys—a reminder that discretion is the ultimate luxury. Limited European production.

products.name: ARMY 74 Shorts
products.description: Military precision meets French rebellion. Archive-inspired shorts bearing '74—the year before everything changed. Heavy-duty construction for those who refuse conformity.

products.name: MONEY Graphic T-Shirt
products.description: The currency of exclusivity. Premium European cotton with hand-finished graphics that speak the universal language. For those who understand value beyond price.

products.name: Architect Zip Hoodie
products.description: Structured rebellion. Heavy-gauge French terry with architectural seaming and concealed hardware. Built for those who design their own reality, not follow blueprints.

products.name: Architect Zip Hoodie
products.description: Structured rebellion. Heavy-gauge French terry with architectural seaming and concealed hardware. Built for those who design their own reality, not follow blueprints.

products.name: Archive Jacket
products.description: History rewritten in thread. Vault-inspired construction with studded hardware and reinforced shoulders. Each piece numbered, each wearer part of the archive. European craftsmanship meets punk defiance.

products.name: Army Sweatpants
products.description: Discipline without conformity. Military-grade fleece with reinforced utility details and château insignia. Comfort for those who earned it.

products.name: Dazzled Logo Shorts
products.description: Reflective defiance. Chrome-finished château emblem on premium European cotton. Built to be seen only by those who matter. Limited production run.
